mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_reservation (work_order_no, material_id, reserved_qty) VALUES (#{workOrderNo}, #{materialId}, #{qty}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reserved_qty = reserved_qty + VALUES(reserved_qty), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(mi.actual_quantity, mi.quantity)), 0) FROM material_inventory mi WHERE mi.material_id = #{materialId} AND (mi.is_discarded IS NULL OR mi.is_discarded = 0)
SELECT wom.material_id AS materialId, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty FROM work_order_material wom WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order w SET w.shortage_status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE w.order_id = #{workOrderNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN material_reservation r ON r.work_order_no = wom.work_order_id AND r.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = w.order_id AND COALESCE(r.reserved_qty,0) < wom.required_qty )
